title: ophryosporus clavulatus
intro: Ophryosporus clavulatus, also known as the clubbed ophryosporus, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae that is native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ophryosporus clavulatus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used as a powder or in capsule form.
